---
title: "Calculator: $t$-testing"
author: Tom Coleman
format: html
abstract-title: Summary
abstract: Calculators to provide facilities for all types of $t$-testing.
---

```{r, setup, include = FALSE}
library("webexercises")
```

## $t$-testing calculator

```{=html}
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/jstat@latest/dist/jstat.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-2.30.0.min.js"></script>
<style>

.tcalc-container {
  margin: 1rem 0;
}

.tcalc-row {
  display: grid;
  gap: 1rem;
}

.tcalc-row-2 {
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
}

.tcalc-row-3 {
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr;
}

@media (max-width: 992px) {

  .tcalc-row-2,
  .tcalc-row-3 {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

}

.tcalc-card {
  border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
  border-radius: 0.375rem;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: white;
}

.tcalc-header {
  background: #3F68B6;
  color: white;
  font-weight: 600;
  padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
}

.tcalc-body {
  padding: 1rem;
}

.tcalc-results {
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

.tcalc-btn {
  border: 1px solid #3F68B6;
  background: white;
  color: #3F68B6;
  padding: 0.8rem 1.5rem;
  border-radius: 0.375rem;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-size: 1.1rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  min-width: 220px;
}

.tcalc-btn.active {
  background: #3F68B6;
  color: white;
}

.form-label {
  font-weight: 500;
}

.form-control,
.form-select {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 0.4rem;
}

</style>

<div class="tcalc-container">

  <div style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:1rem;">

    <button
      id="btnOne"
      class="tcalc-btn active"
      type="button">
      One-sample t-test
    </button>

    <button
      id="btnTwo"
      class="tcalc-btn"
      type="button">
      Two-sample t-test
    </button>

  </div>

  <!-- ONE SAMPLE -->

  <div id="onePanel">

      <div class="tcalc-card">

        <div class="tcalc-header">
          Parameters
        </div>

        <div class="tcalc-body">

          <label class="form-label">
            Sample size (n)
          </label>

          <input
            id="n1"
            class="form-control"
            type="number"
            value="30"
            min="1"
          >

          <br>

          <label class="form-label">
            Sample mean
          </label>

          <input
            id="xbar1"
            class="form-control"
            type="number"
            value="50"
            step="0.01"
          >

          <br>

          <label class="form-label">
            Sample standard deviation
          </label>

          <input
            id="s1"
            class="form-control"
            type="number"
            value="10"
            min="0.001"
            step="0.01"
          >

          <br>

          <label class="form-label">
            Population mean (μ₀)
          </label>

          <input
            id="mu0"
            class="form-control"
            type="number"
            value="45"
            step="0.01"
          >

          <hr>

          Calculate the t-statistic for testing whether a sample mean differs from a population mean.

        </div>

      </div>

    <br>
    
    <div class="tcalc-card">

        <div class="tcalc-header">
          Formula
        </div>

        <div class="tcalc-body">

          \[
          t =
          \frac{\bar{x}-\mu_0}
          {s/\sqrt{n}}
          \]

        </div>

    </div>

    <div class="tcalc-card">

      <div class="tcalc-header">
        Results
      </div>

      <div
        id="oneResults"
        class="tcalc-body tcalc-results">
      </div>

    </div>

  </div>

  <!-- TWO SAMPLE -->

  <div
    id="twoPanel"
    style="display:none;">

    <div class="tcalc-row tcalc-row-2">

      <div class="tcalc-card">

        <div class="tcalc-header">
          Sample 1
        </div>

        <div class="tcalc-body">

          <label>Sample Size (n₁)</label>
          <input id="n1_two" class="form-control" type="number" value="25">

          <br>

          <label>Sample Mean (x̄₁)</label>
          <input id="xbar1_two" class="form-control" type="number" value="52">

          <br>

          <label>Sample SD (s₁)</label>
          <input id="s1_two" class="form-control" type="number" value="8">

        </div>

      </div>

      <div class="tcalc-card">

        <div class="tcalc-header">
          Sample 2
        </div>

        <div class="tcalc-body">

          <label>Sample Size (n₂)</label>
          <input id="n2_two" class="form-control" type="number" value="30">

          <br>

          <label>Sample Mean (x̄₂)</label>
          <input id="xbar2_two" class="form-control" type="number" value="48">

          <br>

          <label>Sample SD (s₂)</label>
          <input id="s2_two" class="form-control" type="number" value="10">

        </div>

      </div>

    </div>
    
    <br>
    
     <div class="tcalc-card">

        <div class="tcalc-header">
          Test Settings
        </div>

        <div class="tcalc-body">

          <select
            id="testType"
            class="form-select">

            <option value="independent">
              Independent Samples (Equal variances)
            </option>

            <option value="welch">
              Independent Samples (Welch's t-test)
            </option>

            <option value="paired">
              Paired Samples
            </option>

          </select>
          
          <br>
      
      Choose between pooled t-test,
    Welch's t-test, or a paired-samples
    approximation.

        </div>

      </div>

    <br>

    <div class="tcalc-card">

  <div class="tcalc-header">
    Formula
  </div>

  <div
    id="twoFormula"
    class="tcalc-body">
  </div>

</div>

<br>

<div class="tcalc-card">

  <div class="tcalc-header">
    Results
  </div>

  <div
    id="twoResults"
    class="tcalc-body tcalc-results">
  </div>

</div>

  </div>

</div>

<div class="tcalc-card">

  <div class="tcalc-header">
    p-value and tail selection
  </div>

  <div class="tcalc-body">

    <label>
      <input
        type="radio"
        name="tailType"
        value="two"
        checked>
      Two-tailed
    </label>

    <br>

    <label>
      <input
        type="radio"
        name="tailType"
        value="upper">
      One-tailed (upper)
    </label>

    <br>

    <label>
      <input
        type="radio"
        name="tailType"
        value="lower">
      One-tailed (lower)
    </label>

    <hr>

    <div id="pValueOutput"></div>

  </div>

</div>

<div class="tcalc-card">

  <div class="tcalc-header">
    T Distribution Plot
  </div>

  <div class="tcalc-body">

    <div
      id="tDistributionPlot"
      style="height:350px;">
    </div>

  </div>

</div>

<script>

let currentT = null;
let currentDF = null;

const onePanel = document.getElementById("onePanel");
const twoPanel = document.getElementById("twoPanel");

document.getElementById("btnOne").onclick = () => {

  onePanel.style.display = "block";
  twoPanel.style.display = "none";

  btnOne.classList.add("active");
  btnTwo.classList.remove("active");

  updateOneSample();

};

document.getElementById("btnTwo").onclick = () => {

  onePanel.style.display = "none";
  twoPanel.style.display = "block";

  btnTwo.classList.add("active");
  btnOne.classList.remove("active");

  updateTwoSample();

};

function updateOneSample() {

  const n =
    Number(document.getElementById("n1").value);

  const xbar =
    Number(document.getElementById("xbar1").value);

  const s =
    Number(document.getElementById("s1").value);

  const mu0 =
    Number(document.getElementById("mu0").value);

  const se = s / Math.sqrt(n);

  const t =
    (xbar - mu0) / se;
    
  currentT = t;
  currentDF = n - 1;
  
  updatePValueCard();
  updateTDistributionPlot();

  document.getElementById("oneResults").innerHTML = `
    <strong>T-statistic:</strong> ${t.toFixed(6)}<br>
    <strong>Degrees of freedom:</strong> ${n - 1}<br>
    <strong>Standard error:</strong> ${se.toFixed(6)}
  `;
}

function updateTwoSample() {

  const n1 =
    Number(document.getElementById("n1_two").value);

  const x1 =
    Number(document.getElementById("xbar1_two").value);

  const s1 =
    Number(document.getElementById("s1_two").value);

  const n2 =
    Number(document.getElementById("n2_two").value);

  const x2 =
    Number(document.getElementById("xbar2_two").value);

  const s2 =
    Number(document.getElementById("s2_two").value);

  const type =
    document.getElementById("testType").value;

  let html = "";

  if(type === "independent") {

    const sp =
      Math.sqrt(
        (((n1-1)*s1*s1)+((n2-1)*s2*s2))
        /(n1+n2-2)
      );

    const se =
      sp*Math.sqrt(1/n1 + 1/n2);

    const t =
      (x1-x2)/se;
      
      currentT = t;
currentDF = n1 + n2 - 2;
      
      updatePValueCard();
updateTDistributionPlot();
      
    document.getElementById("twoFormula").innerHTML = `
\\[
t=
\\frac{\\bar{x}_1-\\bar{x}_2}
{s_p\\sqrt{1/n_1+1/n_2}}
\\]

\\[
s_p=
\\sqrt{
\\frac{
(n_1-1)s_1^2+
(n_2-1)s_2^2
}
{
n_1+n_2-2
}
}
\\]
`;

if(window.MathJax){
  MathJax.typesetPromise();
}

    html = `
      <strong>Independent samples t-test (Equal variances)</strong><br><br>
      T-statistic: ${t.toFixed(6)}<br>
      Degrees of freedom: ${n1+n2-2}<br>
      Pooled SD: ${sp.toFixed(6)}<br>
      Standard error: ${se.toFixed(6)}
    `;
  }

  else if(type === "welch") {

    const se =
      Math.sqrt(
        (s1*s1/n1)+(s2*s2/n2)
      );

    const t =
      (x1-x2)/se;

    const num =
      Math.pow(
        (s1*s1/n1)+(s2*s2/n2),
        2
      );

    const den =
      Math.pow(s1*s1/n1,2)/(n1-1) +
      Math.pow(s2*s2/n2,2)/(n2-1);

    const df = num/den;
    
    currentT = t;
    currentDF = df;
    
    updatePValueCard();
updateTDistributionPlot();
    
    document.getElementById("twoFormula").innerHTML = `
\\[
t=
\\frac{\\bar{x}_1-\\bar{x}_2}
{
\\sqrt{
s_1^2/n_1+s_2^2/n_2
}
}
\\]

\\[
df=
\\frac{
(s_1^2/n_1+s_2^2/n_2)^2
}
{
\\frac{(s_1^2/n_1)^2}{n_1-1}
+
\\frac{(s_2^2/n_2)^2}{n_2-1}
}
\\]
`;

if(window.MathJax){
  MathJax.typesetPromise();
}

    html = `
      <strong>Welch's t-test</strong><br><br>
      T-statistic: ${t.toFixed(6)}<br>
      Degrees of freedom: ${df.toFixed(2)}<br>
      Standard error: ${se.toFixed(6)}
    `;
  }

  else {

    const n =
      Math.min(n1,n2);

    const sdiff =
      Math.sqrt(s1*s1 + s2*s2);

    const se =
      sdiff/Math.sqrt(n);

    const t =
      (x1-x2)/se;
      
    currentT = t;
currentDF = n - 1;

updatePValueCard();
updateTDistributionPlot();
      
      document.getElementById("twoFormula").innerHTML = `
\\[
t=
\\frac{
\\bar{x}_1-\\bar{x}_2
}
{
s_{\\text{diff}}/\\sqrt{n}
}
\\]

\\[
s_{\\text{diff}}
\\approx
\\sqrt{
s_1^2+s_2^2
}
\\]
`;

if(window.MathJax){
  MathJax.typesetPromise();
}

    html = `
      <strong>Paired samples t-test (approximation)</strong><br><br>
      T-statistic: ${t.toFixed(6)}<br>
      Degrees of freedom: ${n-1}<br>
      Standard error of differences: ${se.toFixed(6)}<br>
      s<sub>diff</sub> ≈ ${sdiff.toFixed(6)}
    `;
  }

  document.getElementById("twoResults").innerHTML =
    html;
}

function updatePValueCard() {

  if(currentT === null || currentDF === null) {
    return;
  }

  const tail =
    document.querySelector(
      'input[name="tailType"]:checked'
    ).value;

  let p;
  let label;

  if(tail === "two") {

    p =
      2 * (
        1 -
        jStat.studentt.cdf(
          Math.abs(currentT),
          currentDF
        )
      );

    label = "Two-tailed p-value";

  }

  else if(tail === "upper") {

    p =
      1 -
      jStat.studentt.cdf(
        currentT,
        currentDF
      );

    label = "Upper-tailed p-value";

  }

  else {

    p =
      jStat.studentt.cdf(
        currentT,
        currentDF
      );

    label = "Lower-tailed p-value";

  }

  document.getElementById(
    "pValueOutput"
  ).innerHTML = `
    <strong>${label}:</strong>
    ${p.toFixed(6)}
  `;

}

function updateTDistributionPlot() {

  if(currentT === null || currentDF === null) {
    return;
  }

  const tail =
    document.querySelector(
      'input[name="tailType"]:checked'
    ).value;

  const xmax =
    Math.max(
      4,
      Math.abs(currentT) * 1.5
    );

  const xmin = -xmax;

  const x = [];
  const y = [];

  for(let i = 0; i <= 1000; i++) {

    const xi =
      xmin +
      (xmax - xmin) * i / 1000;

    x.push(xi);

    y.push(
      jStat.studentt.pdf(
        xi,
        currentDF
      )
    );

  }

  const curve = {

    x,
    y,

    mode: "lines",

    line: {
      color: "darkgray",
      width: 3
    },

    hoverinfo: "skip",

    name: ""

  };

  const traces = [curve];

  const addTail = (xs) => {

    const ys =
      xs.map(
        v =>
          jStat.studentt.pdf(
            v,
            currentDF
          )
      );

    traces.push({

      x: [...xs, xs[xs.length-1], xs[0]],

      y: [...ys, 0, 0],

      fill: "toself",

      fillcolor:
        "rgba(63,104,182,0.6)",

      line: {
        width: 0
      },

      hoverinfo: "skip",

      showlegend: false

    });

  };

  if(tail === "two") {

    addTail(
      x.filter(
        v => v >= Math.abs(currentT)
      )
    );

    addTail(
      x.filter(
        v => v <= -Math.abs(currentT)
      )
    );

  }

  else if(tail === "upper") {

    addTail(
      x.filter(
        v => v >= currentT
      )
    );

  }

  else {

    addTail(
      x.filter(
        v => v <= currentT
      )
    );

  }

  const layout = {

    margin: {
      l: 50,
      r: 20,
      t: 20,
      b: 50
    },

    xaxis: {
      title: "t-statistic"
    },

    yaxis: {
      title: "density"
    },

    shapes: [

      {
        type: "line",

        x0: 0,
        x1: 0,

        y0: 0,
        y1: Math.max(...y),

        line: {
          color: "black",
          dash: "dot"
        }
      },

      {
        type: "line",

        x0: currentT,
        x1: currentT,

        y0: 0,
        y1: Math.max(...y),

        line: {
          color: "#db4315",
          dash: "dash",
          width: 2
        }
      }

    ]

  };

  if(tail === "two") {

    layout.shapes.push({

      type: "line",

      x0: -Math.abs(currentT),
      x1: -Math.abs(currentT),

      y0: 0,
      y1: Math.max(...y),

      line: {
        color: "#db4315",
        dash: "dash",
        width: 2
      }

    });

  }

  Plotly.react(
    "tDistributionPlot",
    traces,
    layout,
    {
      responsive: true,
      displayModeBar: false
    }
  );

}

function refreshCurrentCalculator() {

  if(onePanel.style.display !== "none") {

    updateOneSample();

  } else {

    updateTwoSample();

  }

}

[
  "n1",
  "xbar1",
  "s1",
  "mu0"
].forEach(id => {

  document
    .getElementById(id)
    .addEventListener(
      "input",
      refreshCurrentCalculator
    );

});

[
  "n1_two",
  "xbar1_two",
  "s1_two",
  "n2_two",
  "xbar2_two",
  "s2_two"
].forEach(id => {

  document
    .getElementById(id)
    .addEventListener(
      "input",
      refreshCurrentCalculator
    );

});

document
  .getElementById("testType")
  .addEventListener(
    "change",
    refreshCurrentCalculator
  );

  
document
  .querySelectorAll(
    'input[name="tailType"]'
  )
  .forEach(el => {

    el.addEventListener(
      "change",
      () => {

        updatePValueCard();
        updateTDistributionPlot();

      }
    );

  });

updateOneSample();


</script>
```




## Version history {-}

v1.0: created by tdhc 08/25.

  - v1.1: facilities transferred from R Shinylive to html by tdhc in 06/26.
  
[This work is licensed under CC BY-NC-SA 4.0.](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/?ref=chooser-v1)
